text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, the grounds are deserted
apart from Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should focus on improving my form
today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hm, that didn't feel quite right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I still have some time... Just a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I-I didn't mean to run this long...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After pushing herself too hard during the morning
training session, Mejiro McQueen ends up
wearing herself out.
